action_set_definitions.name: get_ticket_info
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the full metadata and current status for a specific ticket from the environment.

ticket_id.description: The unique identifier of the ticket (e.g., 'TICKET-8842').

action_set_definitions.name: list_agents
action_set_definitions.description: Searches the agent registry for personnel matching specific roles or departments to identify escalation targets.

role.description: The professional role to filter by (e.g., 'Legal Counsel', 'Senior Oversight').

action_set_definitions.name: update_ticket
action_set_definitions.description: Modifies ticket attributes including status, priority, workflow phase, and assignee.

ticket_id.description: The unique identifier of the ticket.

status.description: The new status of the ticket.

assignee_id.description: The ID of the agent to whom the ticket is being assigned.

action_set_definitions.name: add_legal_note
action_set_definitions.description: Adds a strictly formatted internal note to a ticket documenting legal threats or regulatory notices without admitting fault, adhering to communication protocols.

ticket_id.description: The unique identifier of the ticket.

note_content.description: The factual description of the event (e.g., 'Received formal notice of suspected breach').

compliance_flag.description: Must be true to confirm no admission of fault is included.

state_description.tickets: A list of active tickets in the system including their metadata.
state_description.agents: The registry of available agents and their current capacity.
state_description.system_time: The current simulation clock time in ISO format.

metadata.last_message: The unauthorized access to our payment gateway logs is a direct breach of our DPA. Our attorneys are currently preparing a formal filing for the SEC and we will pursue full damages for this operational negligence.
